reviews.comment:
1,30 horas esperando para cargar combustibles, porque no tienen descarga a distancia, y estaban recibiendo camión. Después que empezaron a despachar,  un solo playero, el otro adentro de la oficina, y lamentablemente es la única estación ya que no hay ninguna dentro de ita ibate

(Translated by Google)
Waiting 1.5 hours to load fuel, because they don't have remote unloading, and they were receiving trucks. After they started dispatching, only one truck driver, the other inside the office, and unfortunately, it's the only station since there aren't any inside Ita Ibate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRbVluS0hBEAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre que viajo a Misiones paro aquí. Baños limpios. Kiosko. Agua caliente para el mate

(Translated by Google)
Whenever I travel to Misiones, I stop here. Clean bathrooms. Kiosk. Hot water for mate.
